    421.Minthara: This night shall be done sooner than any of us would like. I hope we meet again.EPI_Epilogue_HasMet_Minthara

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Object | speaker 1 Player

              370.Minthara: Then they are fools. You are the best of them, or I would not have chosen you.

              Metadata

            43.Minthara: Of course you could leave them! You owe your people nothing.

            Metadata

              Metadata

                Metadata

                        542.Minthara: Do not mistake this benevolence for indulgence. My patience is gossamer thin.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d7abd9e6-ecf1-c694-6374-3d25e016c235Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hf9d4daf0g64e3g4c56gad7dg681985b9eda0Text UUID: f9f33f71-2c73-4c86-8a4d-f067b4ce804dTimeline Phase Index: 136Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d7abd9e6-ecf1-c694-6374-3d25e016c235Timeline Phase Duration: 19.81sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Timeline Animation 1 Resource ID: 01cf3ae8-3458-4403-9171-7d2f54e05d79Timeline Animation 1 Resource File: Public/Shared/Assets/Characters/_Anims/Dwarves/_Female/DWR_F_Rig/_Construction/DWR_F_Rig_DFLT_CINE_NodHead_Yes_StandL_03.GR2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1340.23s-1349.06s] | @ 1342.79s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1340.23s-1349.06s] | @ 1345.67s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 3Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 3 [1351.29s-1358.88s] | @ 1354.43s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 25Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 3 [1351.29s-1358.88s] | @ 1356.95s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 3 [1351.29s-1358.88s] | @ 1357.86s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4) | variation 25Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 3 [1351.29s-1358.88s] | @ 1358.16s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 25 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 3 [1351.29s-1358.88s] | @ 1358.17s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | variation 25 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 3 [1351.29s-1358.88s] | @ 1358.44s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | variation 25 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 4 [1358.88s-1360.04s] | @ 1359.1s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 4 [1358.88s-1360.04s] | @ 1359.26s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 11: Shot 4 [1358.88s-1360.04s] | @ 1359.44s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 12: Shot 4 [1358.88s-1360.04s] | @ 1360.01s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicryGroup ID: d7abd9e6-ecf1-c694-6374-3d25e016c235Group Index: 0

                362.Player: I stand by my decision. It was the right thing to do.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 90a64957-8655-302a-9597-68885a94951bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h31b19080g4284g4d4egaa9cgb343395de6feText UUID: b80a669a-2352-4cdf-9ec5-775fc147eb15Show Once: True

                  57.Minthara: I see... Good. I may not agree with your choice, but at least you have conviction in it.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 153a9e12-9570-47ca-28ff-e2a83fbb2792Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h9025bcdeg7d7ag4ed5g83cagfd23415b0662Text UUID: 1e75cbe9-243f-48be-98b5-cf6992279c21Timeline Phase Index: 141Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 153a9e12-9570-47ca-28ff-e2a83fbb2792Timeline Phase Duration: 10.35sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1415.08s-1425.43s] | @ 1416.71s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1415.08s-1425.43s] | @ 1418.31s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1415.08s-1425.43s] | @ 1422.88s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 3Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1425.43s-1434.1s] | @ 1425.43s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024)
                  • See Node 381 (Minthara) But if your senses ever grace you with their presence again and you wish to return to my side... I may consider your plea.

            586.Minthara: Lae'zel has an army - she is hardly alone. And she certainly does not need you to protect her.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e9f80461-7f7a-fc1c-8721-b510b943673aSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h5bc86443g9cc3g428eg8badge062d6efefccText UUID: d8b21e50-9d13-47fb-a877-bd6782d706dcTimeline Phase Index: 72Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e9f80461-7f7a-fc1c-8721-b510b943673aTimeline Phase Duration: 9.62sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [633.69s-643.31s] | @ 635.42s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 3Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [633.69s-643.31s] | @ 638.09s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [633.69s-643.31s] | @ 640.25s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [643.31s-648.65s] | @ 643.31s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 2
            • See Node 265 (Minthara) No, you were presented with a choice of paths. And you chose poorly.

          556.Minthara: Nothing worth doing is 'easy'. If anyone has proven that, we have.

              293.Minthara: Promise that once you are done in the Hells, you will return to my side. And help me take Baldur's Gate.

              Metadata

                  18.Minthara: Of course it is - my feelings demand a high price. This should not come as a surprise.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 08423a57-6688-a5db-4c20-a1f101678564Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h3e8395b3g18d2g4760g8082gd96242a48272Text UUID: 8e206e72-aaa6-46dc-93d2-3795be9e73b6Timeline Phase Index: 147Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 08423a57-6688-a5db-4c20-a1f101678564Timeline Phase Duration: 18.31sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1504.07s-1510.31s] | @ 1504.27s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 3Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1504.07s-1510.31s] | @ 1507.52s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1504.07s-1510.31s] | @ 1508.9s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [1510.31s-1521.51s] | @ 1511.93s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 3Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [1510.31s-1521.51s] | @ 1514.74s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [1510.31s-1521.51s] | @ 1517.37s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [1510.31s-1521.51s] | @ 1520.43s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 3 [1521.51s-1522.38s] | @ 1521.51s | speaker 1 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 3 [1521.51s-1522.38s] | @ 1521.66s | peanut slot 0 | Disgust (128) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 10: Shot 3 [1521.51s-1522.38s] | @ 1521.94s | peanut slot 2 | Disgust (128) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 11: Shot 3 [1521.51s-1522.38s] | @ 1522.14s | peanut slot 1 | Disgust (128) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 12: Shot 1 [1522.38s-1529.61s] | @ 1522.38s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Group ID: 08423a57-6688-a5db-4c20-a1f101678564Group Index: 0

                    192.Minthara: You could have dominated the Netherbrain and given me all of Faerûn. This is a bargain by comparison.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4b25dbc0-16a2-cc2a-6ce8-f4e34f13d68bSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hd0e22405g8066g40acg8dd8g185617f4ba0cText UUID: 71371116-569c-4f16-81f2-77bfab63362bGroup ID: 08423a57-6688-a5db-4c20-a1f101678564Group Index: 1
              • +

    599.Minthara: Dekarios the divine graces us with his presence. I hope you do not expect me to bow or utter a prayer in your honour.ORI_Gale_State_IsGodGaleEPI_Epilogue_HasMet_Minthara

                  114.Minthara: There is no mark you could put upon me, or proclamation you could make against me, that would make my life more hazardous than it already is.

                  Metadata

                  522.Minthara: You are many things, Gale. The man who became a god, the Wizard of Waterdeep... but a keeper of secrets you are not.

                  Metadata

                  Flags and Tags

                    545.Minthara: I fear there can be no victory in the war that has chosen us, but every moment we spend together is cause for celebration.

                    Metadata

                          543.Minthara: Either way, the city's future is assured. I will make it my home, and in time, Waterdeep, Neverwinter and the rest... they will be my vassals. [End]

                  613.Minthara: I feared that returning to the Underdark as an apostate of Lolth would be an act of madness.

                  Metadata

                588.Minthara: Your ambition is not cruel, but you fear that if you indulge it, you will lose yourself in the mysteries of the Weave and unravel the world.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: eabd95f7-15bc-d50f-c423-c9ce05f80b95Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h046b64f6g8524g42b0gb56cg524c1cef1298Text UUID: bc848218-9076-4d7c-aeb6-dfd23cba643dGroup ID: e1c4d4db-00f6-f060-c988-9b7f5bb40607Group Index: 1
                • +
                  549.Minthara: You are afraid of so many things, and it is that fear that keeps you true to yourself.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: da535a94-a1ac-546c-259e-925b2ee50e11Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: ha64f1797g2eb6g4f49gb1e7g14bbdb2f9e1aText UUID: 88f42569-3817-4bab-b8df-e4c1119147fcGroup ID: e1c4d4db-00f6-f060-c988-9b7f5bb40607Group Index: 2
                  • +

            405.Minthara: And you're still the same charming blend of pompous and naive. It is good that there are some constants in these maddening Realms.

            Metadata

                  81.Minthara: If you were not afraid you would be delusional. Harness that fear. It can make you strong.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1fa1a598-5c18-8fac-6a8f-e317e173e3a3Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hd6b92681g017fg402bg81b5ga5ae7e8aa076Text UUID: 24b9198b-d9b0-414a-b691-f30781859458Timeline Phase Index: 161Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1fa1a598-5c18-8fac-6a8f-e317e173e3a3Timeline Phase Duration: 38.01sTimeline Phase Shots: 6Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1654.84s-1666.86s] | @ 1658.8s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1654.84s-1666.86s] | @ 1661.41s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1654.84s-1666.86s] | @ 1663.08s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [1666.86s-1671.93s] | @ 1667.23s | speaker 1 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [1666.86s-1671.93s] | @ 1667.33s | peanut slot 0 | Sad (32) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [1666.86s-1671.93s] | @ 1667.71s | peanut slot 1 | Sad (32) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [1666.86s-1671.93s] | @ 1668.14s | peanut slot 2 | Sad (32) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 3 [1671.93s-1683.47s] | @ 1672.91s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 3 [1671.93s-1683.47s] | @ 1674.83s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 3 [1671.93s-1683.47s] | @ 1675.93s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 3 [1671.93s-1683.47s] | @ 1682.59s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 12: Shot 4 [1683.47s-1687.65s] | @ 1683.47s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 13: Shot 4 [1683.47s-1687.65s] | @ 1685.37s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 14: Shot 4 [1683.47s-1687.65s] | @ 1686.47s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 15: Shot 5 [1687.65s-1691.83s] | @ 1690.35s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 16: Shot 1 [1692.85s-1696.56s] | @ 1692.85s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 25Group ID: 1fa1a598-5c18-8fac-6a8f-e317e173e3a3Group Index: 0

                    349.Minthara: You may not realise it yet, but when you were a young warrior desperate for the approval and favour of Vlaakith, you knew nothing but fear.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8d0a6f6b-66c5-bc27-0145-90ced74e71a5Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h11400b45g2e9eg4b6bg9822g4ab952d57966Text UUID: 3e5672b2-941b-4d84-994e-09fc81940d05Group ID: 1fa1a598-5c18-8fac-6a8f-e317e173e3a3Group Index: 1
                    • +
                      129.Minthara: Fear of rejection, fear of failure, fear of not living up to the impossible expectations of a mad queen.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2f17ff8d-75eb-5c07-de22-5be9c981aeedSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h25573501g6f06g47b1gbf90g8a45b2276d22Text UUID: 7003d95c-840d-4bad-8e38-439c1d421abbGroup ID: 1fa1a598-5c18-8fac-6a8f-e317e173e3a3Group Index: 2
                      • +

          561.Minthara: Only the fortunate and the bold are able to live the life they choose. I am happy for you.

          Metadata

              213.Minthara: A word of advice? If there are those who would be hurt by your departure, do not slip away without saying goodbye.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 51f17d2e-fe17-cd4d-e8aa-f1c27b841276Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hc73cdbcfgba55g4d0agbd23g28c87114556fText UUID: 631fe7e9-e314-4265-9cf1-2db899ae6e95Timeline Phase Index: 171Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 51f17d2e-fe17-cd4d-e8aa-f1c27b841276Timeline Phase Duration: 18.81sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1815.55s-1824.19s] | @ 1817.94s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1815.55s-1824.19s] | @ 1821.2s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1815.55s-1824.19s] | @ 1822.56s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [1824.19s-1829.52s] | @ 1824.19s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [1824.19s-1829.52s] | @ 1827.12s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 3 [1829.52s-1833.74s] | @ 1829.52s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 3 [1829.52s-1833.74s] | @ 1830.59s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 3 [1829.52s-1833.74s] | @ 1831.61s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 1 [1834.36s-1836.66s] | @ 1834.36s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 1 [1834.36s-1836.66s] | @ 1834.36s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Group ID: 51f17d2e-fe17-cd4d-e8aa-f1c27b841276Group Index: 0

                • +

            488.Minthara: Of course. The city's prodigal son, returned as a saviour, and yoked to a devil - it is such a perfect satire, who could help but laugh?

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c491e2ff-814a-c8ed-378e-c04e9fb4f9a0Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: ha306b651g8b3cg493fgb4adg56c103bd9682Text UUID: b12f0ea1-9341-41ae-9a3d-7e05756e6bd4Timeline Phase Index: 101Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c491e2ff-814a-c8ed-378e-c04e9fb4f9a0Timeline Phase Duration: 17.12sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [884.86s-898.25s] | @ 886.75s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [884.86s-898.25s] | @ 889.36s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [884.86s-898.25s] | @ 890.55s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [884.86s-898.25s] | @ 892.33s | speaker 0 | Sleeping (256) | variation 24Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [884.86s-898.25s] | @ 893.22s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 4Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [884.86s-898.25s] | @ 896.19s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [898.25s-899.49s] | @ 898.25s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 3 [899.49s-901.98s] | @ 899.49s | speaker 1 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 3 [899.49s-901.98s] | @ 899.71s | peanut slot 2 | Angry (8) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 10: Shot 3 [899.49s-901.98s] | @ 899.83s | peanut slot 0 | Angry (8) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 11: Shot 3 [899.49s-901.98s] | @ 899.88s | peanut slot 1 | Angry (8) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 12: Shot 1 [901.98s-903.46s] | @ 901.98s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 23Group ID: c491e2ff-814a-c8ed-378e-c04e9fb4f9a0Group Index: 0

                    90.Minthara: In fact, when I pass them in the street, they wish me 'good day' and 'good fortune'.

                    Metadata

                    • +
                      474.Minthara: Do not forget, young Ravengard, that I too am one of the saviours of Baldur's Gate. I stood with you when the city was on its knees.

                      Metadata

                          167.Minthara: If the city should fall, I will be here to raise it again. I am many things, but I am not a fool.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 42ab210a-c123-2526-f954-439384cef3d2Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h1ad0c61ega726g4fabg82dcgf27dd9b43300Text UUID: 3da50f08-3d1f-488a-8907-21d6ba6f9ca0Timeline Phase Index: 196Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 42ab210a-c123-2526-f954-439384cef3d2Timeline Phase Duration: 19.07sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2103.64s-2121.38s] | @ 2107.74s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2103.64s-2121.38s] | @ 2112.8s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2103.64s-2121.38s] | @ 2117.7s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [2103.64s-2121.38s] | @ 2119.6s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [2122.71s-2124.39s] | @ 2122.71s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [2122.71s-2124.39s] | @ 2122.71s | speaker 1 | Happy (2)Group ID: 42ab210a-c123-2526-f954-439384cef3d2Group Index: 0
                          • +
                            446.Minthara: While Baldur's Gate is my home, I would see it stronger than its neighbours, and I will do everything in my power to make it so.

                118.Minthara: Given your position, there are certain things that must go unsaid, but let us just say I do what you cannot to keep the city strong.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2b14cd30-951b-ca36-a9c3-e2d0645e28a0Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: ha8ddc8a8g8630g4b0ag806eg51d3ef7ac21eText UUID: 46fb05b9-7dd2-4b0c-a008-3f32b7ad9433Timeline Phase Index: 130Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2b14cd30-951b-ca36-a9c3-e2d0645e28a0Timeline Phase Duration: 24.45sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1234.93s-1259.38s] | @ 1234.97s | peanut slot 1 | Fear (16) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1234.93s-1259.38s] | @ 1237.14s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1234.93s-1259.38s] | @ 1239.18s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1234.93s-1259.38s] | @ 1240.61s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1234.93s-1259.38s] | @ 1243.06s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1234.93s-1259.38s] | @ 1247.01s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [1234.93s-1259.38s] | @ 1253.06s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 4Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [1234.93s-1259.38s] | @ 1255.72s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 1 [1259.38s-1262.58s] | @ 1259.38s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 4Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 1 [1259.38s-1262.58s] | @ 1259.38s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Group ID: 2b14cd30-951b-ca36-a9c3-e2d0645e28a0Group Index: 0

              88.Minthara: You could choose to lay down your blade, to lay down your life, to give up your soul. That you do not tells me which life matters most to you.

              Metadata

            326.Minthara: I was taught that any man who spoke out of line, or above his lowly station, should be punished. I called that justice.

      3.Minthara: I thought you vainglorious, and saw your adventures on the frontiers as little more than an excuse to grow your legend.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 01c34bdb-c48a-690a-85b6-cda999115cf3Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h841ccd6dg90a8g4cb7g9ae5g0737b5e04411Text UUID: f030cabd-af38-400a-a2a1-690365c65dccTimeline Phase Index: 113Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 01c34bdb-c48a-690a-85b6-cda999115cf3Timeline Phase Duration: 26.51sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1025.96s-1045.46s] | @ 1027.62s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1025.96s-1045.46s] | @ 1034.53s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1025.96s-1045.46s] | @ 1039.03s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1025.96s-1045.46s] | @ 1042.51s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [1045.46s-1051.53s] | @ 1045.91s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [1045.46s-1051.53s] | @ 1048.45s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [1045.46s-1051.53s] | @ 1049.84s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [1052.47s-1060.11s] | @ 1052.47s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 25Group ID: 01c34bdb-c48a-690a-85b6-cda999115cf3Group Index: 0

        24.Minthara: Now you fight in the Hells, where there is little to be gained, and much to be lost.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 09798e34-eb44-29e2-66f0-5875164f4ca7Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h59d8ec32gd1f2g4f15gb15dgabd495e0eb20Text UUID: f83eaedc-ee7a-4798-bfba-e9a029ff44e1Group ID: 01c34bdb-c48a-690a-85b6-cda999115cf3Group Index: 1
        • +

                    257.Minthara: Yes, Wyll. I am a paragon of virtue. I volunteer at a local orphanage, and rehabilitate wounded owlbear cubs.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 654a788b-54b2-c0eb-c215-11976f7afd83Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h00c11106g694cg4c5dgbe69g2f218cb837c1Text UUID: f99cfa15-fc5e-4088-b3d5-c3bae63537b4Timeline Phase Index: 182Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 654a788b-54b2-c0eb-c215-11976f7afd83Timeline Phase Duration: 21.66sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1945.35s-1961.18s] | @ 1946.89s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1945.35s-1961.18s] | @ 1949.44s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1945.35s-1961.18s] | @ 1951.44s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1945.35s-1961.18s] | @ 1952.89s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1945.35s-1961.18s] | @ 1953.75s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1945.35s-1961.18s] | @ 1955.18s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [1945.35s-1961.18s] | @ 1957.09s | speaker 0 | Sad (32) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [1945.35s-1961.18s] | @ 1958.54s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 1 [1945.35s-1961.18s] | @ 1959.91s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 4Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 2 [1961.18s-1964.06s] | @ 1961.66s | speaker 1 | Confusion (1024)Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 2 [1961.18s-1964.06s] | @ 1961.8s | peanut slot 0 | Confusion (1024) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 12: Shot 2 [1961.18s-1964.06s] | @ 1961.88s | peanut slot 1 | Confusion (1024) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 13: Shot 2 [1961.18s-1964.06s] | @ 1962.02s | peanut slot 2 | Confusion (1024) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 14: Shot 1 [1967.01s-1974.65s] | @ 1967.01s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Group ID: 654a788b-54b2-c0eb-c215-11976f7afd83Group Index: 0
                    • +
                      434.Minthara: All so that the children and cubs alike can be moulded to my purpose, raised in my image, and made willing to die in my name.

                      Metadata

              353.Minthara: Everyone in these Realms is afraid of something. Wolves, sunlight, beasts, fiends, death... loneliness.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8ebee92d-799d-1f39-98ae-99481fd23b2bSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hec9566ffg05f2g4b39g892eg8ce88220dae3Text UUID: 020eb758-babb-4cdb-ab62-c8f59de87dc1Timeline Phase Index: 207Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8ebee92d-799d-1f39-98ae-99481fd23b2bTimeline Phase Duration: 22.94sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2212.41s-2222.69s] | @ 2215.78s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2212.41s-2222.69s] | @ 2217.03s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2212.41s-2222.69s] | @ 2218.61s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [2222.69s-2225.3s] | @ 2222.94s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 3 [2225.3s-2235.35s] | @ 2231.71s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [2235.35s-2249.37s] | @ 2235.35s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024)Group ID: 8ebee92d-799d-1f39-98ae-99481fd23b2bGroup Index: 0
              • +
                190.Minthara: But those who fear themselves travel the most difficult road to find their courage. You have done so, Wyll.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 49558102-09f8-a1bb-397c-ddeaf24c2550Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h42870f75g56ccg40f1ga1f4g2927faeb8e58Text UUID: 3804141f-72b3-4850-84bd-510de885cc24Group ID: 8ebee92d-799d-1f39-98ae-99481fd23b2bGroup Index: 1
                • See Node 211 (Minthara) You have become a better man than you were.

              91.Minthara: Well, then you are a greater fool than I thought. There is no glory in the Hells.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 23717c5c-5a23-b308-02e5-f1defc353e0eSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h4630b1c6g50fdg4000g9b21g06eac61c8b04Text UUID: 257cc14f-fd1e-438f-b667-ddd3f01e34f8Timeline Phase Index: 123Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 23717c5c-5a23-b308-02e5-f1defc353e0eTimeline Phase Duration: 13.96sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1126.51s-1140.47s] | @ 1129.99s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1140.47s-1149.41s] | @ 1140.47s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1140.47s-1149.41s] | @ 1140.47s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Group ID: 23717c5c-5a23-b308-02e5-f1defc353e0eGroup Index: 0
              • +

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: be026ddd-03a3-6bb0-c428-63ab0324c1f5Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hc427ba28g63f7g4fc1g80a1g6156c7e63aa1Text UUID: b4f5cef1-c061-4cd3-ba1d-79408e291a03Group ID: 40668fd7-2bb3-22f3-6ef1-5397dac40716Group Index: 1
                • See Node 482 (Minthara) You and Lady Shar may claim the souls of Baldur's Gate. I will focus my attention on material things.

              248.Minthara: Perhaps. But do not be surprised if you hear the howl of the wolves one night, or see a sign flashing across the stars, and leave your hearth behind.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5fc5161b-da21-14f9-ffad-0caf7c97eb2fSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hde7fe4fbgb1c3g4083gafd2g42d0d542f502Text UUID: e343bf2c-0150-4968-8631-44f9405a98cdTimeline Phase Index: 170Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5fc5161b-da21-14f9-ffad-0caf7c97eb2fTimeline Phase Duration: 20.22sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1795.33s-1809.1s] | @ 1796.72s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1795.33s-1809.1s] | @ 1799.22s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1795.33s-1809.1s] | @ 1803.42s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1795.33s-1809.1s] | @ 1806.1s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [1809.1s-1815.55s] | @ 1810.96s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1815.55s-1824.19s] | @ 1815.55s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Group ID: 5fc5161b-da21-14f9-ffad-0caf7c97eb2fGroup Index: 0
              • +
                151.Minthara: I do not think your adventuring days are behind you.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3ab7629b-dce8-379c-b64f-6c0c88e8d570Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h7a4e7881ge1fag4037g84feg4a7e6d085de3Text UUID: c81a5beb-1853-428d-9672-85855e45673bGroup ID: 5fc5161b-da21-14f9-ffad-0caf7c97eb2fGroup Index: 1
                • See Node 516 (Minthara) Tranquility will always be waiting, at the end of your journey. Wherever it takes you.

        491.Minthara: What is 'normal'? You and I were born to do extraordinary things - we have challenged the gods and live to tell of it.

        Metadata

        46.Minthara: Hmph. I am surprised you have survived there so long. Your face shines like a sickly beacon even in this light.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0ff5ca18-fd01-c6f5-ea39-e7c65b18eff9Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h2f858dbegb9e8g4405ga9c1gc13ae8abee5fText UUID: a11ef842-81d1-4ebe-b425-82c2bfa2eaf3Timeline Phase Index: 160Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0ff5ca18-fd01-c6f5-ea39-e7c65b18eff9Timeline Phase Duration: 10.33sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1644.51s-1654.84s] | @ 1645.66s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1644.51s-1654.84s] | @ 1649.51s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1644.51s-1654.84s] | @ 1650.65s | speaker 0 | Sad (32) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1644.51s-1654.84s] | @ 1651.91s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1644.51s-1654.84s] | @ 1653.04s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1654.84s-1666.86s] | @ 1654.84s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)

              486.Minthara: Yes - my life is rich. A night without an assassin is a dull night indeed.

              Metadata

      256.Player: I have a little boudoir just below a new drow restaurant in the Lower City. It's very fungal - you'd like it.Full-Illithid

      Flags and Tags

      ruletagtype rule
      • Full-Illithid {3797bfc4-8004-4a19-9578-61ce0714cc0b}

      Text

      Variant 1

      combine=0
      • Full-Illithid
      I have a little boudoir just below a new drow restaurant in the Lower City. It's very fungal - you'd like it.

                628.Minthara: Excellent. It will save me the effort of sneaking in under a false name. It is tiresome to masquerade before the ball even begins.

                Metadata

                268.Minthara: If you can not recognise my qualities, you can wear Cazador's title and squat in his palace for as long as you like.

                321.Minthara: Helping an ally is its own reward. But I can think of few greater challenges than battling across the Hells.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7f2011b7-d4d2-3517-3ea7-f8cc1fcb4781Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h73150081gba69g4b70gb7d8g18a790467772Text UUID: 04b91693-6f30-48c9-93d4-c055d16facaaTimeline Phase Index: 191Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7f2011b7-d4d2-3517-3ea7-f8cc1fcb4781Timeline Phase Duration: 22.18sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 3 [2058.22s-2068.58s] | @ 2059.55s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 3 [2058.22s-2068.58s] | @ 2061.99s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 3 [2058.22s-2068.58s] | @ 2064.99s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 3 [2058.22s-2068.58s] | @ 2066.16s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 4Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [2069.44s-2072.63s] | @ 2069.44s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Group ID: 7f2011b7-d4d2-3517-3ea7-f8cc1fcb4781Group Index: 0
                • +
                  200.Minthara: Besides, what else would you have me do? Lay down my weapons and spend my last centuries growing plump? I think not.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4e488f86-2416-e515-5eff-a75ae3ed3487Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hb4f9479fg1d07g4f7bgab69g94ee648492bcText UUID: 7b7e8050-d1b7-46b9-a587-a9db1315f534Group ID: 7f2011b7-d4d2-3517-3ea7-f8cc1fcb4781Group Index: 1
                  • See Node 38 (Player) So! What've you been up to, Minthara?
                  • See Node 536 (Player) Leave.
        • +
          313.Minthara: I have a war of my own to fight, against my mother and her people, and there is every chance I will not survive it.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7c169886-301c-fbea-9f6b-ffb0dd2a4ae5Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h2dd6553dgd905g486bgaac9g3d166c6c4d7fText UUID: 473eab5f-4df2-448f-9612-195b4aa748ebTimeline Phase Index: 133Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7c169886-301c-fbea-9f6b-ffb0dd2a4ae5Timeline Phase Duration: 16.94sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1293.3s-1302.42s] | @ 1295.97s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1293.3s-1302.42s] | @ 1299.26s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [1302.42s-1309.34s] | @ 1304.38s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1310.24s-1318.59s] | @ 1310.24s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Group ID: 7c169886-301c-fbea-9f6b-ffb0dd2a4ae5Group Index: 0
          • +
            123.Minthara: But if I do, I will gladly bring my strength to Avernus to fight by your side again.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2dc29639-6cc4-3c2d-cd47-932882759b24Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hbe86e571g43d7g4a5bg8051gc58f139e9a60Text UUID: 7481821b-214b-4efa-89da-c22e3b8109f1Group ID: 7c169886-301c-fbea-9f6b-ffb0dd2a4ae5Group Index: 1
            • See Node 277 (Player) Thanks. I need all the help I can get.
            • See Node 372 (Player) I don't understand why you're so kind to me.
            • See Node 436 (Player) What's in it for you?
    • +
